name: Chicken and Leek Pie (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry and let it cool in a cold place.
2. In a deep 1 - 1 1/2 quart dish, layer the chicken, ham, leeks, onion/shallot, mace, nutmeg, and seasoning. Repeat layers until full.
3. Add chicken stock, then dampen the edges of the dish.
4. Roll out pastry to fit the dish, place over the pie filling, and press edges well. Crimp with a fork.
5. Make a small hole in the center. Roll out remaining pastry scraps into a leaf or rosette for topping. Lightly cover the hole.
6. Brush pastry with milk and bake at moderate heat (350F) for 25-30 minutes.
7. If top browns too much, cover with damp greaseproof paper while partially cooked.
8. Gently warm cream.
9. When pie is done, remove from oven, lift rosette, pour cream through hole, replace rosette and serve.
Jointed, chopped, and boned.
